2603.28300.title: NeiGAD: Augmenting Graph Anomaly Detection via Spectral Neighbor Information
2603.28300.paper_summary: Graph anomaly detection (GAD) aims to identify irregular nodes or structures in attributed graphs. Neighbor information, which reflects both structural connectivity and attribute consistency with surrounding nodes, is essential for distinguishing anomalies from normal patterns. Although recent graph neural network (GNN)-based methods incorporate such information through message passing, they often fail to explicitly model its effect or interaction with attributes, limiting detection performance. This work introduces NeiGAD, a novel plug-and-play module that captures neighbor information through spectral graph analysis. Theoretical insights demonstrate that eigenvectors of the adjacency matrix encode local neighbor interactions and progressively amplify anomaly signals. Based on this, NeiGAD selects a compact set of eigenvectors to construct efficient and discriminative representations. Experiments on eight real-world datasets show that NeiGAD consistently improves detection accuracy and outperforms state-of-the-art GAD methods. These results demonstrate the importance of explicit neighbor modeling and the effectiveness of spectral analysis in anomaly detection. Code is available at: https://github.com/huafeihuang/NeiGAD.
2603.28300.paper_summary_zh: 圖形異常檢測（GAD）旨在識別屬性圖中的不規則節點或結構。鄰居信息反映了結構連通性和與周圍節點的屬性一致性，對於區分異常與正常模式至關重要。儘管最近基於圖神經網絡（GNN）的方法通過信息傳遞納入了這種信息，但它們往往未能明確建模其對屬性的影響或交互，從而限制了檢測性能。本研究介紹了NeiGAD，一個新穎的即插即用模塊，通過光譜圖分析捕捉鄰居信息。理論見解表明，鄰接矩陣的特徵向量編碼了局部鄰居交互並逐步放大異常信號。基於此，NeiGAD選擇一組緊湊的特徵向量來構建高效且具區分性的表示。在八個現實世界數據集上的實驗顯示，NeiGAD始終提高檢測準確性，並超越了最先進的GAD方法。這些結果證明了明確鄰居建模的重要性以及光譜分析在異常檢測中的有效性。代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/huafeihuang/NeiGAD。
2603.28300.author: Qing Qing et.al.
2603.28300.authors: Qing Qing, Huafei Huang, Mingliang Hou, Renqiang Luo, Mohsen Guizani
